fields.title: Fields are being mapped
fields.description: Soon you'll wander our trails — harbour, courtyard, and hill — each a path through culture, knowledge, and the arts. We're laying the stones now. Come walk them with us shortly.

beANeighbor.title: A place for neighbors is taking shape
beANeighbor.description: Becoming a neighbor means joining the community that keeps these stories alive. We're building a warm way for you to step in, lend a hand, and belong. Your seat at the table is almost ready.

giftATrace.title: Gifting a trace is almost here
giftATrace.description: Soon you'll be able to give a trace — a contribution offered in someone's name, a small act that helps preserve our shared memory. We're wrapping it up with care. Thank you for your patience.

traceAStory.title: Your story is worth the wait
traceAStory.description: The space to trace your own story — to share a memory, a testimony, or a piece of art — is being polished to do it justice. Hold onto your words; we can't wait to hear them very soon.

home.title: A new front page is taking shape
home.description: We're reimagining the doorway to the archive. While we decide what to greet you with first, the magazine and everything already inside are open to explore.
